creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rigoletto
Date: Mon Mar  4 21:39:10 UTC 2019
New revision: 494652
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/494652

Log:
  New port: x11-themes/materia-gtk-theme

  Materia (formerly Flat-Plat) is a Material Design theme for GNOME/GTK+
  based desktop environments. It supports GTK+ 3, GTK+ 2, GNOME Shell,
  Budgie, Cinnamon, MATE, Unity, Xfce, LightDM, GDM, Chrome theme, etc.

  PR:		235914
  Submitted by:	Hiroki Tagato <tagattie@yandex.com>
  Reviewed by:	tcberner (mentor)
  Approved by:	mat (mentor)
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.freebsd.org/D19338

Changes:

  head/x11-themes/materia-gtk-theme/
